title: [Synth] Add resource usage analysis
body:
This commit adds a new resource usage analysis pass for the Synth dialect that computes resource utilization across module hierarchies, including:
- AIG, MIG, other logic comb operations (xor, or, and)
- Truth tables
- Sequential elements (DFFs)

The analysis provides both local (per-module) and total (including child instances) resource counts. It supports both text and JSON output formats

This also changes circt-synth's `output-longest-path` option to `analysis-output` which specifies the directory for the analysis log.
